parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won') as total_won,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Lost') as total_lost,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'No-Go') as total_nogo,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('Won','Lost')) as total_competed,
  COUNT(*) as total_decisions,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('Won','Lost')), 0), 1) as win_rate_pct,
  COALESCE(SUM(contract_value) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won'), 0) as total_won_value,
  COALESCE(SUM(contract_value) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Lost'), 0) as total_lost_value,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('Won','Lost')), 0), 1) as ytd_win_rate,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('Won','Lost') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') as qtd_competed,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') as qtd_won,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'Won' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('Won','Lost') AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'), 0), 1) as qtd_win_rate
FROM gda_win_loss
WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE);

-- Also pull agency breakdown
SELECT agency, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome='Won') as won, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome='Lost') as lost, ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE outcome='Won')/NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE outcome IN('Won','Lost')),0),1) as wr FROM gda_win_loss WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY agency ORDER BY won DESC LIMIT 5;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_win_rate_digests (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, insight TEXT, win_rate_ytd NUMERIC, win_rate_qtd NUMERIC, won_value_m NUMERIC, bids_per_win TEXT, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW());
INSERT INTO gda_win_rate_digests (insight, win_rate_ytd, win_rate_qtd, won_value_m, bids_per_win) VALUES ({{ $json.insight }}, {{ $json.data.computed.win_rate_pct }}, {{ $json.data.computed.qtd_win_rate }}, {{ $json.data.computed.total_won_value_m }}, {{ $json.data.computed.bids_per_win }});

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{status:'ok', message:'Win/loss DB has no FY26 decisions yet. Start logging bids to activate digest.', checked_at: new Date().toISOString()}}];
